questions.scenario: Several VMs need to read and write files in the same shared directory tree. Which service is the better first thought?

options.text: A signed URL for every directory operation.

questions.explanation: Filestore provides managed shared file storage.

questions.scenario: A shared directory has `/mnt/incoming`, `/mnt/processing`, and `/mnt/complete`. What is that path structure?

options.text: Part of the application protocol for shared file work.

questions.explanation: Shared paths need ownership and workflow conventions.

questions.scenario: Which questions belong in Filestore review?

options.text: How is throughput and capacity monitored?
Can it replace all analytical tables?

questions.explanation: Shared filesystems need client, ownership, and operational review.
